verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Expect a miracle to happen in this place, Expect a miracle to happen by God's grace, And through a miracle, you will shown His power, Expect a miracle this very hour.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: If we only live our life expecting miracle, If we'd only turned our hearts in Jesus way, Then this world will love in love and by God's power we'd see miracle, Mighty miracle everyday.
